description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden storage box with a weathered, whitewashed finish and reinforced black metal edges. The box features horizontal wood planks on all visible sides, giving it a rustic, utilitarian appearance suitable for industrial or urban environments. Two sides of the box display black upward-pointing arrow symbols, indicating the correct upright orientation for handling and transport. The top surface has a white adhesive label, suggesting it is used for shipping, storage, or inventory purposes. The box appears solid and robust, with no visible handles or locking mechanisms, and is likely designed to be stackable or placed on the ground. Its size and construction suggest it is intended for storing or transporting medium to large items in urban settings such as warehouses, garages, or loading docks.
description: A large, whitewashed wooden storage box with black metal reinforcements and upward arrow symbols on two sides. It features a label on top and a rugged, industrial look suitable for urban storage or shipping.
description_view_0: The box is seen from a side with no markings, showing the horizontal wood planks and black metal frame.
description_view_1: This view displays one of the sides with two black upward-pointing arrows and part of the top label visible.
description_view_2: The opposite side is shown, plain with no arrows or labels, emphasizing the wood texture and metal edges.
description_view_3: Another arrow-marked side is visible, similar to view 1, with the arrows positioned to the right.
